name: careapp
description: OWBRHE Care Study Submission PWA with React, Express, PostgreSQL, JWT authentication, PDF uploads, exports, and audit logging.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently "npm run dev:local --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
